certificatemanager.account.CfnAbout: The `AWS::CertificateManager::Account` resource defines the expiry event configuration that determines the number of days prior to expiry when ACM starts generating EventBridge events.

certificatemanager.account.ExpiryEventsC.Description: Object containing expiration events options associated with an AWS account. For more information, see [ExpiryEventsConfiguration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/acm/latest/APIReference/API_ExpiryEventsConfiguration.html) in the API reference.
